programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: Weekly investigative documentary series that looks at the use and abuse of power.

programme.desc: Live, breaking and in-depth news from Asia, Africa, Europe and the Americas.

programme.desc: Viewers are connected to news stories via social media.

programme.desc: A series of one-hour documentaries showcasing films from across the Al Jazeera Network.

programme.desc: The Lebanese Civil War forces around 30,000 Muslims and Christians to flee their homeland and join an exodus to Australia to start new lives.

programme.title: Frames
programme.desc: As a child Djemba became one of the thousands of children who live hand to mouth on the streets of Sub-Saharan Africa's largest shanty town, Kibera.

programme.title: Generation Change
programme.desc: We explore how a new generation of South African activists is tackling climate change, race, gender and class inequality.

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.desc: As the Cuban government grapples with protests it imposes internet blackouts and jams communications. Also, the rise of the socially conscious sports star.

programme.desc: A French-Moroccan mother is determined to fight hatred with love after her son is killed in a spate of gun attacks by Mohamed Merah.

programme.desc: The show features the economical stories that shape our world and has an effect on the lives of the common human beings.

programme.title: Generation Change
programme.desc: Young Lebanese organizers discuss strategies for combating corruption and sectarianism at a critical moment in Lebanon's history.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
programme.desc: The Lebanese Civil War forces around 30,000 Muslims and Christians to flee their homeland and join an exodus to Australia to start new lives.

programme.title: Frames
programme.desc: As a child Djemba became one of the thousands of children who live hand to mouth on the streets of Sub-Saharan Africa's largest shanty town, Kibera.

programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community. Viewers join us live on YouTube and Twitter to interact with Femi Oke and guests.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
programme.desc: By the late 1990's the Lebanese Australian community was being terrorised by a violent criminal minority enforcing the drug racket with extreme violence.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: World news linking Al Jazeera's international news centres.

programme.desc: Live, breaking and in-depth news from Asia, Africa, Europe and the Americas.

programme.desc: Welcome to Sierra Leone's first and only surf club.

programme.desc: Live, breaking and in-depth news from Asia, Africa, Europe and the Americas.

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: Investigating the shocking living conditions at a Greek island camp for migrants trying to get into Europe.

programme.desc: Live, breaking and in-depth news from Asia, Africa, Europe and the Americas.

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A French-Moroccan mother is determined to fight hatred with love after her son is killed in a spate of gun attacks by Mohamed Merah.

programme.desc: Live, breaking and in-depth news from Asia, Africa, Europe and the Americas.

programme.desc: 101 East meets South Korea's youngest classical music prodigies and finds out what it takes to succeed on the international stage.

programme.title: Counting the Cost
programme.desc: Counting the Cost provides background to the economics stories that shape our world and impact the lives of ordinary people.

programme.desc: The trials and tribulations of the Somali women's football team as they fight cultural barriers and funding problems in their bid to represent their country.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
programme.desc: After 9/11 many in the Lebanese-Australian community feel their loyalty is being unfairly questioned. Many feel accused of being a terrorist enemy within.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: World news linking Al Jazeera's international news centres.
